params.destStrategy: Target strategy address on destination chain

confirmTransfer(bytes32,bytes32).details: Called by bridge contract when funds arrive on destination

onTokensReceived(bytes32,uint256).details: Called by bridge contract when tokens arrive

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

bridgeToRollup(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Initiate a bridge transfer to another rollup

calculateBridgeFee(uint256).notice: Calculate bridge fee for an amount

onTokensReceived(bytes32,uint256).notice: Handle incoming tokens from another rollup
